chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, and delivery information

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: OrderLineItem
triplets.object: a single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: OrderLineItem
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers

entities_post_resolution.name: Wireless Headphones
entities_post_resolution.definition: Wireless Headphones are electronic audio devices that connect wirelessly to audio sources, used for personal listening.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: The period during which customer data or transaction rights are retained for business or legal purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category Identifier
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing the categorization of items, where CATEGORY_ID is the unique identifier and CATEGORY_NAME is the display name for the category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: CUSTOMER_MASTER is a master data entity that uniquely identifies customers within the system, typically keyed by CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on a platform who makes purchases and is involved in transactions such as refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | - Unique Customer ID | - Valid email address (required for login) | - One or more delivery/billing addresses | - Geographic region for tax calculation | - Active/inactive status | - Must place at least one order to remain active | - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | **Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOL

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Wireless Headphones are audio devices that connect to audio sources via wireless technology, used for personal listening.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an individual entry within a sales order or invoice that details a specific product, quantity, and price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unique line identifier | - References exactly one Product | - Quantity of units ordered | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. | Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order date refers to the specific date when an order was placed or initiated in a business transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | - Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order Line Item is an individual product entry within a sales order, representing a specific product and quantity in a transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | - Must place at least one order to remain active

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a formal transaction document recording the agreement between a platform and a customer to supply products, tracking customer details, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information. | - Unique Order ID | - References exactly one Customer | - Order date when transaction was initiated | - Total monetary value | - Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | - Must contain at least one Order Line Item | - Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | - Status changes are logged for audit purposes | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Parent Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A category entity in the database that classifies products, with attributes such as CATEGORY_ID and PARENT_CATEGORY_ID for hierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment is a monetary transaction used to settle an order amount, which can be made through various methods and may be associated with one or more payments per sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | - Unique Payment ID | - Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) | - Payment amount | - Confirmation timestamp | - Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The product name is a human-readable label used to identify and display a product within a system or catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | - Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform, organized into categories and tracked in inventory.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform. | They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses. | - Unique SKU code | - Human-readable product name | - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | - Active/inactive status | - Belongs to exactly one Category | - Must belong to a valid category before being sold | - References exactly one Product | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: SALES_ORDER_HDR is the database table that stores header information for sales orders, identified uniquely by ORDER_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is the physical delivery of products to customers, typically associated with a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | - Unique Shipment ID | - Source Warehouse | - Destination Customer Address | - Shipped timestamp | - Tracking number | - Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | SHIPMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing the product catalog or product information stored in a database table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price is the cost of a single unit of a product or service, expressed in a specific currency, used for pricing and billing purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Source Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: A source warehouse is a storage facility from which shipments originate in the supply chain process.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Source Warehouse | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core information about customers, including their contact details and account status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products available in the inventory, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories and their hierarchical relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores header information for sales orders, including order details, status, payment confirmation, and delivery timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each product line item within customer orders, including quantities, prices, and total amounts.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of payments made for sales orders, including payment details, status, and timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including shipment identifiers, associated order references, warehouse locations, shipment dates, tracking details, and current shipment status.
